message:
feat(acl+function): real-Redis parity for ACL user flags/passwords/categories and FUNCTION/FCALL_RO

Completes an in-flight real-Redis parity pass across fr-command and
fr-runtime, restoring a clean compile. Extends the prior
"real-redis parity" work (b064d25) to the ACL view surface and the
FUNCTION subcommand family.

fr-runtime — ACL
- AclUser::new_restricted(): new constructor for users created via
  `ACL SETUSER <name> ...`. Redis starts new users disabled with no
  passwords, no commands, no keys, and no channels; subsequent rules
  build them up. The existing `new_default` remains the constructor
  for the built-in `default` user (enabled + nopass + all_commands +
  all_keys + all_channels).
- AuthState::set_user now picks `new_default` only when the username
  equals the default-user constant; every other username inserts a
  fresh `new_restricted` entry so rules applied on the same call behave
  identically to real Redis.
- ACL LIST / ACL GETUSER flag rendering:
    - Replaces the whitespace-split `"on nopass"` string with an
      explicit RespFrame array built element-by-element.
    - Always emits `sanitize-payload` (Redis emits this unconditionally
      since 7.x).
    - Encodes each stored password as hex-lowercase (matches Redis's
      SHA-256 hex rendering in ACL GETUSER).
    - Adds the `selectors` key to the reply map (empty array for now;
      we do not support the full selector grammar yet).
- ACL CAT default list: drops `server` and `generic`; Redis 7.x exposes
  only the eight categories we already emit. The fallback error is also
  realigned from `ERR Unknown ACL cat category` to
  `ERR Unknown category` to match real Redis's string.
- ACL WHOAMI / ACL CAT name casing: returns lowercase category names,
  mirroring real Redis's output.
- Added `hex = "0.4"` dependency to fr-runtime to service the new
  password rendering.

fr-command — FUNCTION / FCALL_RO
- FUNCTION STATS: `running_script` is now a `BulkString(None)` (Redis's
  way of saying "no function is currently running") instead of an
  integer 0, matching the real Redis schema.
- FUNCTION HELP: rewritten to match Redis's multi-line help output
  verbatim — subcommand banner, KILL, FLUSH mode details, RESTORE
  policy semantics — via the shared `hello_simple` rendering helper
  used by HELLO/ACL HELP. This replaces the terse one-line-per-
  subcommand stub.
- FCALL / FCALL_RO split: `fcall_cmd` now inspects `argv[0]` to tell
  whether the invocation is FCALL_RO, propagates the proper lowercase
  name into WrongArity, and rejects any attempt to run a function that
  is not flagged `no-writes` under FCALL_RO with Redis's exact error
  (`ERR Can not execute a script with write flag using *_ro command.`).
  The script-nesting check fires before arg parsing so the existing
  guard still runs first.

Also removes the corrupted/duplicate trailing fragments that had been
left at the tail of fr-runtime/src/lib.rs by an interrupted edit
(stray `espFrame::Integer(2)` / `er(0)` / `ame::Integer(0)` partial
blocks after the `mod tests` closing brace); the workspace now
`cargo check`s cleanly.

  "fr-store",

+[[package]]

+checksum = "7f24254aa9a54b5c858eaee2f5bccdb46aaf0e486a595ed5fd8f86ba55232a70"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "id-arena"
 version = "2.3.0"
